_huong_dan: Copy file nay thanh config.json (dat canh MigrationChecker.exe hoac o goc repo) roi sua gia tri can doi. Thieu key nao thi tool dung gia tri mac dinh key do. CLI: --config <file>. Moi gia tri duoi day CHINH LA gia tri mac dinh.
_excel_ghi_chu: Dot 9 — sheet mo ta chi tiet tung method (M001, M002...) trong bao cao Excel, click ten method o sheet Detail de nhay toi. method_sheets=false de tat (he thong cuc lon). max_body_lines: so dong code toi da in ra moi phia trong sheet mo ta.
_llm_ghi_chu: Dot 6 — gate danh gia AI. api_key uu tien neu khac rong, nguoc lai doc bien moi truong ANTHROPIC_API_KEY (doi ten bien qua api_key_env). Doi token: chi can sua api_key roi luu file. CANH BAO: KHONG commit config.json chua api_key len git. cache_file rong -> llm_cache.json canh exe/config (cache theo hash noi dung method de khong goi lai API ton token khi retest). Dot 8 — provider 'auto' tu nhan dien theo key: 'AIza...' = Google AI Studio (Gemini, CO FREE TIER — lay key tai aistudio.google.com, model mac dinh gemini-2.5-flash), 'sk-ant...' = Anthropic Claude (tra phi, model mac dinh claude-sonnet-5). Model khong hop provider se tu thay bang model mac dinh cua provider.
